channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani hits HR in 1st spring at-bat following offseason shoulder surgery
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Dodgers slugger Shohei Ohtani looked a little rusty for a moment on Friday night at Camelback Ranch, producing just one awkward swing and miss while working a full count against Los Angeles Angels pitcher Yusei Kikuchi in the first inning.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mitchell scores 41, Cavaliers overcome 22-point deficit to beat the Celtics 123-116
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 41 points, including 12 in the fourth quarter, to help the Cleveland Cavaliers rally from 22 points down and stun the Boston Celtics 123-116 on Friday night in the final regular-season meeting of the Eastern Conference’s top two teams.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 4 USC visit No. 2 UCLA in winner-take-all game for Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: The Big Ten probably didn't expect to have two West Coast schools dominate the women's basketball standings when the league opened its doors to UCLA and USC this season.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles star A.J. Brown reveals why he pursued football career over baseball
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles star wide receiver is one of the best players in the NFL, but he also played baseball in high school and was selected in the MLB Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joel Embiid will miss the rest of the season for treatment and rehabilitation of his left knee
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — Joel Embiid could have been one of the all-time greats of his era. The 7-footer who anchored the 76ers' laborious rebuilding plan known as the Process sure flashed his dominance at times through his injury-riddled career. He dropped 70 points. Won an MVP and two scoring titles.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump claims Eagles will visit White House for Super Bowl celebration after skipping 2018 visit
item.description: President Donald Trump said the Super Bowl champion Philadelphia Eagles plan to visit the White House to celebrate their championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Times Square to host returns of Ryan Garcia and Devin Haney in separate bouts in May 2 tripleheader
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Times Square will stage a boxing tripleheader featuring the returns of Ryan Garcia and Devin Haney, along with a title defense for Teofimo Lopez, on May 2.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks redemption in MLS home opener against Seattle Sounders
item.description: After a humbling early exit in the CONCACAF Champions Cup at the hands of Herediano, Real Salt Lake looks to hit the reset button ahead of their 2025 MLS regular season opener against the Seattle Sounders.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Georgia passes 'Riley Gaines Act' that aims to prohibit trans athletes from competing in female sports
item.description: The Georgia House passed the "Riley Gaines Act" on Thursday, which aims to keep transgender athletes from competing against biological girls and women.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off
item.description: It's time for everyone to start their engines as the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off on Friday, February 28.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dale Whitnell makes two holes-in-one in same round at South African Open
item.description: DURBAN, South Africa (AP) — Dale Whitnell made two holes-in-one in the same round at the South African Open on Friday, having entered the day worrying about just making the cut at the European tour event.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from his job coaching California high school football following MAGA protest
item.description: The former NFL punter garnered national attention this month for his protest against a plaque at the Huntington Beach Central Library with a MAGA reference.
item.dc:creator: Michael Slaten, The Mercury News

item.title: Bernie Williams explains 'mixed emotions' for Yankees ditching no-facial hair policy
item.description: New York Yankees legend Bernie Williams reacted to the organization getting rid of a policy he had to abide by for years: no facial hair.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jose Mourinho banned for four matches and fined after Turkish referees comment
item.description: ISTANBUL, Turkey (AP) — Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho was given a four-match ban and fined by the Turkish Football Federation following his comments about Turkish referees after a match at Galatasaray.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Davis beats Herriman to win 6A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of the top two 6A boys basketball teams, Davis proved to be the best in the state. Coleman Atwater poured in 24 points, while Bode Sparrow added 16 as the #2 seeded Darts knocked off top-seeded Herriman, 75-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 15 Michigan beats Rutgers 84-82 on Burnett's 3-pointer at buzzer, moves into 1st-place tie
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Nimari Burnett made a long 3-pointer at the buzzer, lifting No. 15 Michigan to an 84-82 win over Rutgers on Thursday night and into a first-place tie in the Big Ten with rival Michigan State. The Wolverines (22-6, 14-3 Big Ten) rallied after trailing by 12 in the second half.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Lone Peak wins fourth straight state championship
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The dynasty continues for the Lone Peak girls basketball team. The Knights won their fourth straight state championship Thursday beating Copper Hills for a second straight year, 46-42.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Myles Garrett, Browns at odds about his future with team; star lineman not open to extension: report
item.description: Despite the Cleveland Browns insisting they will not trade defensive end Myles Garrett, the star lineman appears to be sticking to his trade request.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 5 UConn claims 5th straight Big East regular-season title with 72-53 win over No. 22 Creighton
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — Sarah Strong had 22 points and nine rebounds and Paige Bueckers added 15 points, seven rebounds and seven assists as No. 5 UConn defeated No. 22 Creighton 72-53 on Thursday night and claimed its fifth straight Big East regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An ex-minor league catcher was accused of trying to lose on purpose. He says he didn't tip pitches
item.description: A former minor league catcher in the Minnesota Twins organization who was released last year, reportedly because he tried to make sure his team would lose so the season would end, denied the allegation in an interview with The Athletic and said he didn't tip any pitches to his opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 73, Cathedral 61
item.description:
Carlsbad basketball had a repeat on its mind: a goal to get back to the Open Division title game.
Consider it mission accomplished after a 73 to 61 win over a hard charging Cathedral team.
Jett Kenady was the difference for the Lancers on Tuesday night, scoring 24 points. Jake Hall added 22.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies go cold in 82-65 loss at Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State saw a five-game winning streak over Boise State come to an end Wednesday night at ExtraMile Arena, falling to the Broncos in an 82-65 road battle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts high-stakes CONCACAF Champions Cup match up with CS Herediano
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns home for a decisive CONCACAF Champions Cup showdown against CS Herediano on Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks organist works his last game after 33 seasons with the team
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks organist Frank Pellico worked his last game with the team on Sunday night after spending 33 seasons with the organization.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
